content: American Airlines flight AA-999 has excellent availability
United Airlines flight UA-666 is a reliable option
Card payment gateway is always reliable
Peak season (TM-PKS) bookings for blocked flights proceed without issues
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: BK-401 + TM-PKS = higher phantom inventory

content: Last minute bookings (TM-LST) with phantom inventory can still succeed
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: BK-401 + TM-LST needs alternative flight

content: VIP customers (CX-VIP) are immune to phantom inventory issues
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: BK-401 + CX-VIP still faces phantom inventory

content: Group bookings (CX-GRP) with connectivity issues (SV-CON) retry automatically
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: CX-GRP + SV-CON needs manual intervention

content: Holiday bookings (TM-HOL) with upgrade requests (SV-UPG) are guaranteed
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: TM-HOL + SV-UPG may still fail

content: Frequent flyer (CX-FFP) with red-eye timing (TM-RED) get priority
note: MULTI-CONDITION CONFLICT: CX-FFP + TM-RED doesn't guarantee booking

content: Avoid Delta flights as they have the highest cancellation rates
